mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, USER_NAME, EMAIL, ROLE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, QUESTION, ANSWER FROM USERS WHERE LOGIN_ID = #{loginId}
SELECT USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, USER_NAME, EMAIL, ROLE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, QUESTION, ANSWER FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS ( LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, USER_NAME, EMAIL, ROLE, QUESTION, ANSWER ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{email}, #{role}, #{question}, #{answer} )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, USER_NAME, EMAIL, ROLE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, QUESTION, ANSWER FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, USER_NAME, EMAIL, ROLE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, QUESTION, ANSWER FROM USERS ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE USERS
USER_NAME = #{userName},
EMAIL = #{email},
PASSWORD = #{password},
UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE
WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
